subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I bear witness, even as all things have testified, that there is none other God but Thee. From time immemorial Thou hast been all-powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد بما شهدت الاشیاء انه لا اله الا انت لم تزل کنت مقتدرا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
